[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Soames''' was a [[Jabiimi]] rebel during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She didn't trust [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], but since she was very loyal to [[Nolan Gillmunn]], she didn't have any other choice, but to trust him.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In one panel, her name is spelled "Soams".
